clue: Pay close attention as bird of prey turns wide to right
explanation: HAWK (bird of prey) turns W (wide) to R (right), giving HARK, meaning "pay close attention".
hints: We need a short word that's a bird of prey.
But we're going to swap a letter for a different letter...
Both wide and right can be represented by single letters.
Turn "wide" to "right", in the name of the bird of prey.
